overview.description: The Sterling Capital Multi-Strategy Income ETF (SCMC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed ETF that provides broad exposure to various income-producing securities from around the world. SCMC was launched on Dec 11, 2025 and is issued by Sterling Capital.
